allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const src=fs.readFileSync\('public/widget2.js','utf8'\); const dist=fs.readFileSync\('dist/widget2.js','utf8'\); console.log\('Files match:', src===dist\); console.log\('DOC-DEBUG in public:', src.includes\('ShivAI-DOC-DEBUG'\)\); console.log\('DOC-DEBUG in dist:', dist.includes\('ShivAI-DOC-DEBUG'\)\);")
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -eq 18588 } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/src/marketplace/apps.ts" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; if \($r.Content -match "ai-receptionist"\) { Write-Output "SERVING UPDATED: ai-receptionist found" } else { Write-Output "STALE: ai-receptionist NOT found in served file" }; if \($r.Content -match "How AI helps"\) { Write-Output "SERVING UPDATED: 'How AI helps' found" } else { Write-Output "STALE: 'How AI helps' NOT found" } } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "SupportCRM|error|Error|built in" | Select-Object -First 10; Write-Output "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "SupportCRM|error TS|Error:|built in" | Select-Object -First 10; Write-Output "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "SupportCRM|error|built in" | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Output "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; Write-Output "TSC=$LASTEXITCODE"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "SupportCRM|error|built in" | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Output "BUILD=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "AuthModel|error|built in" | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Output "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
